name: Writing
dial_scope: Learning / cognitive-development panic only (memory, attention, literacy, reasoning, skill formation). Morality, health, and public-order fears are coded separately and do not raise the dial.
dial_scale_note: Ordinal scale used on this site: 0 none, 2 low, 3 moderate, 4 high, 5 severe (1 unused). Not a formula - checklist profile mapped to anchors.
site_notes: Memory atrophy and hollow understanding; the fear is now fully inverted, since we panic when students cannot write.
